name: mind-coherence
description: A portable epistemic-discipline skill suite. Calibrate belief vs knowledge as a probability in [0,1] (never at the extremes), with a stance axis that can represent believed-FALSE 'anti-facts'; combine evidence as Bayesian bookkeeping (log-odds), not false-precision arithmetic; hold contradictions in-tension; audit internally (meditation) and externally (debate + discuss); and resist sycophancy, so a growing context + memory stays coherent without hardening into a coherent delusion.
